name: Strawberries and Creme Fraiche
recipeInstructions:
1. In a chilled bowl, beat together the heavy cream, sugar, and almond extract until stiff peaks form.
2. Gradually fold in the sour cream until evenly blended.
3. Wash and hull the strawberries.
4. Gently toss the strawberries in the cream mixture.
5. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. To serve, spoon the berries into champagne or sherbet glasses.
7. Top each portion with extra creme fraiche and a sprig of mint.
